flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Washtenaw Community College fell 17% between 2006 and 2009 (15.5% → 12.8%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Washtenaw Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.9k → $6.5k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Washtenaw Community College rose 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.0k → $13.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Washtenaw Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).
